source: synthetic expected-result fixture for the reputation-weighted defense; see agent_docs/expected_akash_reputation_results.md

config.weight_use: weighted coordinate-wise median (cumulative weight crosses 0.5 of total weight)

expected_band.band_semantics: low = oracle, mid = realistic, high = degraded
expected_band.notes: Weighted median tilts the per-coordinate selection toward higher-weight clients. Lowest expected ASR of the AkashRep variants (mid 0.05) tied with AkashRep+Krum, at higher agg_time. Story for the paper: only worth running this cell if AkashRep+Krum or AkashRep+TrimMean produce surprises.

comparison_to_baseline.publishability_threshold: AkashRep+Median ASR mid <= AkashRep+FedAvg ASR mid
